ibm_hardware_matrix.scope_note: Published IBM artifacts validate the real-hardware execution and aggregation workflow. The current entanglement estimates remain proxy-backed and are not a direct hardware-side adaptive-advantage comparison.

latest_sweep.scope_note: Most recent one-off local simulation sweep; useful for diagnostics, but not the headline aggregate used for the main README claims.

simulation_matrix.scope_note: Headline simulation aggregate used for the sample-efficiency and coverage claims in the public README and manuscript materials.

raw_provenance_note: Raw IBM job IDs, per-circuit count caches, and detailed execution manifests are retained only in local provenance during artifact generation and are not part of the published repository snapshot.
